ConnectionStrings._security_note: TODO-SEC: SEC-EA-10 — DEV-ONLY password literal. Replace with env var (DOTNET_ConnectionStrings__Default) or Key Vault reference before deployment.

Jwt._security_note: Phase 175 — Jwt:Key is intentionally NOT in source control. Supply via env var (Jwt__Key) in every environment, including Development (see appsettings.Development.json or docker-compose.yml). Startup fails fast when missing or set to a known-bad value.

Cors._note: Web Dashboard CORS allow-list. The Mobile policy in Program.cs accepts any LAN/Expo origin without checking this list; this only affects credentialled (cookie) calls from the planscape-site Next.js app. Override per environment via the Cors__Origins__N env vars (e.g. Cors__Origins__0=https://app.planscape.app).

Seq._note: Leave ServerUrl blank to disable. Local dev: `docker compose --profile observability up -d seq` then http://localhost:5341.

Elastic._note: Leave NodeUris blank to disable. Comma-separate multiple nodes.

Monitoring._note: Set ExposeMetrics=false to disable the /metrics Prometheus endpoint.

Tenant._note: Default branding and behavior when a tenant has not customised its own.
